versions.changelog: Added city, suburb, and neighborhood labels across the Rotterdam-The Hague corridor. Added country:NL so the map now groups correctly under the Netherlands tab in-game alongside Amsterdam, instead of falling through to the no-country bucket.

Initial release (ported by ryandicicco). Original map by Lawrencelot. Covers the Rotterdam-The Hague metro corridor in the Randstad region, including Rotterdam Centrum, The Hague, Delft, Schiedam, Vlaardingen, and Rotterdam The Hague Airport (RTM).
